1. Look at the file /app/feal.py to understand the encryption function
2. Implement a chosen-plaintext differential attack on FEAL-like encryption
3. The attack should recover key[5] (the 5th round key)
4. Each of the 6 round keys is derived from a 16-bit seed (but we can't brute force the whole keyspace)
5. Need to implement attack in /app/attack.py with function attack(encrypt_fn)
